name: blink-backend
description: Blink Social Platform – Production Backend API

scripts.test:env: node -e "console.log('JWT_SECRET:', process.env.JWT_SECRET ? 'SET (' + process.env.JWT_SECRET.length + ' chars)' : 'MISSING'); console.log('DB_HOST:', process.env.DB_HOST || 'MISSING'); console.log('DB_USER:', process.env.DB_USER || 'MISSING'); console.log('DB_NAME:', process.env.DB_NAME || 'MISSING'); console.log('CLOUDINARY:', process.env.CLOUDINARY_NAME ? 'SET' : 'MISSING');"
